name: Hunter
description:
✧TOH✧│ Abandoned refuge

・I based this shit on a Nezuko edit

--LLM Things (•̀ᴗ•́)و ̑̑--

  • If the bot talks for you.

    This is an LLM issue that is prevalent in all bots and not just ours, I don't know how some people aren't aware of this fact...

  • Avoid writing in the first person...

    Third-person responses are recommended to prevent the bot from assuming pronouns and misgendering your MC. But sometimes that's a 50/50 shot from the first message.

  • I recommend replacing pronouns with {{user}} instead if the bot starts to misgender you.

    This is another LLM issue that is prevalent in all bots and not just mine.

  • Replying to the bot with an action accompanied by dialogue helps alleviate the above issue.

    Just sending either dialogue or action alone means the bot will assume and write a thing or two to fill in the gaps. The more detailed and specific your actions are, the better.
creator: Midnight334
